programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Lucille is seconded to St. Cuthbert's where she delivers a baby in an elevator; Nurse Crane gives vaccines to new students; Violet, Trixie, Sister Frances and Valerie organize a fashion show for the community.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News
programme.desc: Dwight Drummond and team take a comprehensive look at the top stories, with breaking news, reports and updates relevant to the city of Toronto.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo ensures that Todd misses his marathon; Will refuses to join his family in condemning Megan; Adam suffers a loss of business; Bernie and Dev find Mal waiting upon their return from vacation.

programme.title: Family Feud Canada
programme.desc: The Castillo family returns to face the Brown family.

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: From conflicts over gender to a right-wing takeover of a Florida college, a filmmaker looks at the political backlash that sparks a broader fight over free speech, power and control.

programme.title: Speechless: Where Do We Go From Here?
programme.desc: A panel discussion with leaders in the field of civic discourse where they explore how we can move forward to have more open, honest and respectful dialogue with each other.

programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News at 11
programme.desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events in Toronto.

programme.title: Land and Sea
programme.desc: There's a race against time for bats in Newfoundland and Labrador; white-Nose Syndrome is ravaging the population and scientists are trying to slow the spread.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo ensures that Todd misses his marathon; Will refuses to join his family in condemning Megan; Adam suffers a loss of business; Bernie and Dev find Mal waiting upon their return from vacation.

programme.title: Coroner
programme.desc: While hosting Thanksgiving dinner with her father and mother-in-law, Jenny's work life and personal life collide.

programme.title: Wild Cards
programme.desc: When the leads of the most popular vampire show on TV become the target of a stalker, Max and Ellis enter the world of showbiz where the behind-the-scenes drama is even wilder than what's on-screen.

programme.desc: Marcie fights to help a mother regain custody of her infant son; Doug represents Colleen's former manny; Avery gets in the way of Marcie and Carson's rekindled relationship.
